name: The Tower: Last Stand
developer: Martin Bammes, Yash Bangera, Matthew Barnes, Chloë Zeng, Ajinkya Dhote, Suwas Walve, Jon Do
short_description: You are alone in a medieval tower that you must defend against a large onslaught of demonic enemies. Inspired by the, “Tower,” Tarot Card, and the Graphic Novel series, “Heavy Metal,” enjoy your attem
